name: enthusiast-source-shopify
documentation:
# Enthusiast Source Shopify

This Enthusiast plugin enables the import of product data directly from Shopify.

methods.name: enthusiast_source_shopify.source.ShopifyProductSource.__init__
documentation:
Initialize the plugin with the parameters to access shop.

Args:
    data_set_id (int): identifier of a data set that products are assigned to.
    config (dict): Parameters such as shop url or access token to configure a plugin.

methods.name: enthusiast_source_shopify.source.ShopifyProductSource.get_query_template
documentation:
Prepares template for querying shopify platform.

Template is used to run queries to loop through all pages returned by Shopify.

methods.name: enthusiast_source_shopify.source.ShopifyProductSource.get_product
documentation:
Translates product definition received from Shopify into ECL product.

Args:
    shopify_product: a product returned by Shopify API
Returns:
    ProductDetails: product definition used by ECL to sync a product.

methods.name: enthusiast_source_shopify.source.ShopifyProductSource.fetch
documentation:
Fetch product list.

Returns:
    list[ProductDetails]: A list of products.
